title: Principles and Protocols for Producers of Tier 1 Statistics
description: New Zealand government standard defining 10 core principles and 6 operational protocols for producing official Tier 1 statistics. Covers relevance, integrity, quality, coherence, accessibility, efficiency, privacy protection, respondent management, data frameworks, and statistical records management.
